notes: No demos/ directory created — the only candidate demo artifacts (run-status-*.html) are gitignored and out of scope.

docs/references/shared/ was renamed to docs/references/python-migration/ (not a sibling-dir move). The vestigial 'shared/' level implied per-phase references that never materialized; explicit py2to3 scoping sets up future migration targets (e.g. Java) to get sibling reference clusters.
27 skill INDEX.md files were updated as part of the references rename.
retrospectives/ remains a fifth top-level directory (established convention, not touched).
GETTING-STARTED.md kept at root as a well-known quick-start landing, not moved into docs/.
Open GitHub issues #14-23 and #26 were sweep-edited to reference the new planning/BACKLOG.md and research/framing-and-bounding/ paths. Closed issues left alone.
llms-full.txt deliberately skipped — project is under active development with large planning docs (50K+ PLAN.md, 174K MIGRATION-GUIDE.md); a curated bundle would be large and quickly stale.
flagged_followups: CHANGELOG.md missing — add once the project starts cutting tagged releases.
Hosted docs site (MkDocs / Read the Docs) worth considering as the tree continues to grow past GitHub-markdown-rendering comfort.
No auto-generated API reference needed — this is a skills catalog, not a library with a public API surface.
